iterations.theme: Colette Nataf's Journey: From Founding Lightning AI to MileIQ's Resurgence and Modern Growth Strategies
iterations.reason_for_cut: This iteration covers the entire main discussion of the podcast, from the introduction of the guest and her companies to the final product updates and personal reflections, concluding before the podcast outro.
